meetings.title: No labels, soon
meetings.description: Will notify and be marked as soon.

meetings.title: Has soon, multiple participants
meetings.description: Will not notify since it is marked as soon.

meetings.title: Soon, canceled, no participants
meetings.description: Will not notify since it is canceled, will be marked as soon.

meetings.title: Not soon
meetings.description: Will not notify nor be marked as soon since it's not within the notice time (e.g. 5 mins).
